summary: venues-now's --max-eta filter now excludes venues with unknown ETA (EstimateMin == 0).
reason: The original guard 'row.EstimateMin > 0 && row.EstimateMin > maxETA' short-circuited for unknown-ETA venues, silently including them even when the user asked for fast delivery. The command's --help promises 'deliver within --max-eta minutes', so unknown-ETA venues cannot satisfy the contract.
